title: Diff Two Model Output Versions
description: Compute which keys changed between two flat dicts, for comparing model outputs across versions.
problem: Write diff_dicts(old, new) returning a dict with three keys: 'added' (keys in new not in old), 'removed' (keys in old not in new), 'changed' (keys in both with different values, mapped to {'old':..,'new':..}).
hint: added = [k for k in new if k not in old]; removed = [k for k in old if k not in new]; changed = {k:{'old':old[k],'new':new[k]} for k in old if k in new and old[k]!=new[k]}
